raw:
JSON: {
  "perspective": "Scaling Engineer",
  "response": "My recent findings and the sub-agent reports indicate a critical gap in the implementation of Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) within the assessment engine's UI. While the core mechanism (`EnergyPicker`, `useEnergyMode`, `data-energy` attribute) is in place, specific components like the risk severity slider, graphical charts, animations, and the 'Detailed Report' section are not fully adapting to 'low' energy mode. This contradicts the 'DONE' status in `swarm-commands.md` regarding Law 2, which likely refers to the presence of the energy picker rather than full UI adaptation of all elements. This oversight can lead to performance issues and a degraded user experience at scale, particularly for neurodivergent users. I will investigate the assessment engine's UI components to ensure full compliance with Law 2.",
  "whistleblower_flag": null,
  "next_files_to_read": [
    "apps/web/src/components/assessment/",
    "apps/web/src/components/assessment/risk-severity-slider.tsx",
    "apps/web/src/components/assessment/charts.tsx",
    "apps/web/src/components/assessment/detailed-report.tsx"
  ]
}
response: My recent findings and the sub-agent reports indicate a critical gap in the implementation of Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) within the assessment engine's UI. While the core mechanism (`EnergyPicker`, `useEnergyMode`, `data-energy` attribute) is in place, specific components like the risk severity slider, graphical charts, animations, and the 'Detailed Report' section are not fully adapting to 'low' energy mode. This contradicts the 'DONE' status in `swarm-commands.md` regarding Law 2, which likely refers to the presence of the energy picker rather than full UI adaptation of all elements. This oversight can lead to performance issues and a degraded user experience at scale, particularly for neurodivergent users. I will investigate the assessment engine's UI components to ensure full compliance with Law 2.
